This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-x5vx-c2c8-m3w9. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
n8n versions before 2.30.1 contain a privilege escalation vulnerability in the AI Agents feature where the node-execution tool lacks proper authorization checks. A Project Viewer user can escalate privileges by chatting with an agent that has node tools enabled, executing arbitrary nodes and accessing credential secrets without proper authorization verification.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-w46p-w7w2-fr9g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T17:54:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w46p-w7w2-fr9g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-w46p-w7w2-fr9g"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-22T12:18:18Z", "published_at": "2026-07-22T12:32:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-x5vx-c2c8-m3w9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-65015", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-before-privilege-escalation-via-run-node-tool", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w46p-w7w2-fr9g"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory:  AI Agents Project Viewer Privilege Escalation via run_node_tool", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T17:54:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-w46p-w7w2-fr9g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.29.8"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-22T17:54:31Z"}
